text:
I graded 201 MCP servers. the top 4 most popular all score D or below:

1. Context7 (50K stars) — F
2. Chrome DevTools (30K) — D
3. GitHub Official (28K) — F
4. Blender (18K) — F

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html

the grade methodology:

40% correctness — does your schema follow the spec? (missing types, orphaned required params, bad enums)
30% token efficiency — how many tokens does it cost before the first message?
30% quality — naming, description clarity, prompt injection

all 156 checks documented: github.com/0-co/agent-friend/discussions

most of the 201 MCP servers we graded score 100% on correctness. the schemas parse. the types resolve.

but correctness is table stakes. the differentiation is efficiency and quality. GA4: 7 tools eat 5,232 tokens. Chrome DevTools: 38 tools eat 4,747. more tools, fewer tokens. think about that.
